title: BEM-533.2 Telegram transport samples
objective:
Run script:
"""
proto = Path('governance/protocols/FILE_TRANSPORT_CONTRACT.md')
samples = Path('governance/transport/samples')
samples.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
report = Path('governance/reports/bem533_2_telegram_transport.md')
report.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
proof = Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem533_2_telegram_transport.txt')
proof.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

text = proto.read_text(errors='ignore') if proto.exists() else '# File Transport Contract\n'
if '## BEM-533 Telegram records' not in text:
    text += '\n\n## BEM-533 Telegram records\nTelegram synthetic/webhook branch uses the same transport contract with `source=telegram`. Required Telegram-specific record types:\n- telegram_intake\n- telegram_ack\n- telegram_failure\nNo Telegram token or secret may be stored in any record.\n'
proto.write_text(text)

records = [
  {'record_type':'telegram_intake','cycle_id':'bem533-telegram-sample','source':'telegram','from_role':'curator','to_role':'executor','status':'completed','artifact_path':'governance/transport/samples/telegram_intake_sample.json','commit_sha':None,'blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 12:57 (UTC+3)','telegram_chat_ref':'redacted_synthetic_chat','telegram_message_ref':'synthetic_message_001'},
  {'record_type':'telegram_ack','cycle_id':'bem533-telegram-sample','source':'telegram','from_role':'curator','to_role':'curator','status':'completed','artifact_path':'governance/transport/samples/telegram_ack_sample.json','commit_sha':None,'blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 12:57 (UTC+3)','ack_status':'accepted'},
  {'record_type':'telegram_failure','cycle_id':'bem533-telegram-sample','source':'telegram','from_role':'curator','to_role':'curator','status':'failed','artifact_path':'governance/transport/samples/telegram_failure_sample.json','commit_sha':None,'blocker':{'code':'TELEGRAM_PAYLOAD_INVALID','message':'synthetic invalid payload'},'retry_allowed':False,'next_action':'ask_curator_to_reject_or_request_clarification','escalation_target':'curator','failure_reason':'invalid_payload','created_at':'2026-05-17 | 12:57 (UTC+3)'}
]
required = ['record_type','cycle_id','source','from_role','to_role','status','artifact_path','commit_sha','blocker','created_at']
valid = True
validation = []
for rec in records:
    path = samples / (rec['record_type'] + '_sample.json')
    path.write_text(json.dumps(rec, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')
    missing = []
    for k in required:
        if k not in rec:
            missing.append(k)
    # secret scan for obvious tokens in sample
    body = json.dumps(rec, ensure_ascii=False).lower()
    secret_hit = ('token' in body or 'secret' in body or 'bot' in body and 'redacted' not in body)
    validation.append({'record_type':rec['record_type'],'missing':missing,'secret_hit':secret_hit})
    if missing or secret_hit:
        valid = False

validator = samples / 'telegram_transport_validator_proof.txt'
validator.write_text('BEM-533.2 telegram transport validator. valid=' + str(valid) + '\n' + json.dumps(validation, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False) + '\n')

report.write_text('# BEM-533.2 | Telegram Transport Samples + Failure Handling | ' + ('PASS' if valid else 'BLOCKER') + '\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 12:57 (UTC+3)\n\n## Выполнено\n- Added Telegram record types to FILE_TRANSPORT_CONTRACT.\n- Created telegram_intake, telegram_ack, telegram_failure samples.\n- Validator proof created.\n- No live Telegram API, no token, no secrets.\n\n## Blocker\n' + ('null' if valid else 'telegram transport validation failed') + '\n')
proof.write_text('BEM-533.2 ' + ('PASS' if valid else 'BLOCKER') + ': Telegram transport samples and failure handling created.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(proto), str(validator), str(report), str(proof)])
for rec in records:
    changed_files.append(str(samples / (rec['record_type'] + '_sample.json')))
ops_applied.append('BEM-533.2 Telegram transport samples and failure handling created')
"""
No issue comments.
